title: Plasticraft Big Globe Add-On
description: This resource pack adds blocks and items from the "Big Globe" mod by BuilderB0y, transforming them into Lego! This pack requires Plasticraft 1.1.0 in order to function correctly.
body:
This resource pack extends the main Plasticraft resource pack to add blocks from the mod "Big Globe" by BuilderB0y. Using this with Plasticraft 1.1.0 lets you experience the expansive world of the mod in Lego.

I do not plan to update this pack, but If you would like it to be, let me know on my Discord server:
[https://discord.gg/nhHzHmnayF](https://discord.gg/nhHzHmnayF)
